sections.paragraph:
Original: צביּם צביּים צבאים o

Transliteration: tsebô'ı̂ym tsebı̂yı̂ym tsebı̂yim

Phonetic: tseb-o-eem'

BDB Definition:

Zeboim or Zeboiim = "gazelles"
  1. one of the 5 cities in the plain which included Sodom and Gomorrah

Origin: pl. of H6643

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
